subcodes.first_line: O candle of the assembly of friends! Upon the pathway of the All-Merciful's love, bestir thyself with agility, and on wings of mystic knowledge soar unto the pure celestial realm [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شمع انجمن یاران در سبیل محبت رحمن چالاک شو و بپرهای عرفان بافلاک پاک
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @disregarding individual capacity; weakness, @call to action, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @being a source of light; guidance
